images.alt:
A towering ancient dragon dominates the interior of a vast Gothic cathedral, its immense serpentine body coiled across the worn stone floor as if it has slumbered there for centuries. Its weathered scales are pale turquoise and silver, scarred by age and softened by time, while long black horns and tangled spines sweep backward like the branches of dead trees. The dragon's jaws are open in a deafening roar, revealing rows of razor-sharp teeth and strands of tattered moss or ancient vines hanging from its mouth, suggesting it has become part of the forgotten ruin itself. Massive translucent wings rise dramatically on either side, their worn membranes catching soft shafts of pale light pouring through towering arches. Long ivory-colored ceremonial drapery cascades across the dragon's chest and coils onto the floor, blending with enormous hanging banners suspended from the cathedral ceiling. Dark stone columns disappear into shadow along the left side while brilliant light floods the right, creating a striking contrast between darkness and sanctuary. The overall atmosphere feels timeless, reverent, and haunting, as though an immortal guardian has awakened inside a sacred place abandoned long ago.
Keywords:
dragon, cathedral, gothic, ancient, wings, scales, fantasy, guardian, ruins, monumental, pale, dramatic
